debug_info.goal:
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut : Type
n : ℕ
pSpec : ProtocolSpec n
inst✝ : (i : pSpec.ChallengeIdx) → SampleableType (pSpec.Challenge i)
σ : Type
init : ProbComp σ
impl : QueryImpl oSpec (StateT σ ProbComp)
relIn : Set (StmtIn × WitIn)
relOut : Set (StmtOut × WitOut)
verifier : Verifier oSpec StmtIn StmtOut pSpec
stF :
  Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl relIn.language relOut.language
    verifier
oneShotE : @Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn n pSpec
stmtIn : StmtIn
tr : Transcript (Fin.last n) pSpec
witOut : WitOut
h :
  ∃ x ∈ support (Verifier.run_simulate ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl verifier stmtIn tr),
    (x, witOut) ∈ relOut
this :
  ¬if n = 0 then
      (stmtIn,
          @Extractor.RoundByRound.extractOut ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn WitOut n pSpec (fun x => WitIn)
            (Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot.toRoundByRound ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn WitOut n pSpec oneShotE) stmtIn tr
            witOut) ∈
        relIn
    else
      Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl relIn.language
          relOut.language verifier stF (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr ∨
        (stmtIn, @oneShotE (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr default) ∈ relIn
⊢ ¬Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl relIn.language
        relOut.language verifier stF (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr ∧
    ∃ x ∈ support (Verifier.run_simulate ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl verifier stmtIn tr),
      ∃ x_1, (x, x_1) ∈ relOut

failed_attempts:
by_cases hn : n = 0
    · simp_all [stF.toFun_empty, stF.toFun_full, show tr = default by ext i; exact Fin.elim0 i]
    · simp_all [Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot.toRoundByRound, hn]
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, hs, h'⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩

constructor
    · cases n with
      | zero => rw [Subsingleton.elim tr default]; exact stF.toFun_empty _
      | succ n => simp at this; exact this.1
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h; exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩

constructor
    · cases n with
      | zero =>
        have : tr = default := Subsingleton.elim tr default
        subst this
        exact stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      | succ n =>
        exact (not_or.mp this).1
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hrel⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hrel⟩

by_cases hn : n = 0
    · subst hn; simp_all [stF.toFun_empty, Subsingleton.elim tr default]
      obtain ⟨x, hx, hRel⟩ := h; exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hRel⟩
    · simp_all; obtain ⟨x, hx, hRel⟩ := h; exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hRel⟩

constructor
    · cases n <;> simp_all [stF.toFun_empty]
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩

constructor
    · cases n
      · rw [Subsingleton.elim tr default]; exact stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      · simp at this; exact this.1
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hx'⟩ := h; exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hx'⟩

constructor
    · split_ifs at this with hn <;> simp_all [stF.toFun_empty, Subsingleton.elim tr default]
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hx_rel⟩ := h; exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hx_rel⟩

constructor
    · cases n <;> simp_all [stF.toFun_empty]
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hRel⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hRel⟩

constructor
    · cases n with
      | zero =>
        rw [Fin.last_zero] at *
        have : tr = default := by ext i; exact Fin.elim0 i
        rw [this]; exact stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      | succ n =>
        simp_all
        exact (not_or.mp this).left
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hRel⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hRel⟩

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · by_cases hn : n = 0
      · subst hn; rw [Subsingleton.elim tr default]; exact stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      · simp [hn, not_or] at this; exact this.1
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hx_rel⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hx_rel⟩

ases n
    · exact (stF.toFun_empty stmtIn (Subsingleton.elim tr default ▸ h_stF)).elim
    · simp [h_stF]

constructor
    · split_ifs at this with hn
      · subst hn; rw [Subsingleton.elim tr default]; apply stF.toFun_empty
      · exact this.1
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hrel⟩ := h; exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hrel⟩

constructor
    · cases n
      · exact stF.toFun_empty _
      · simp_all
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩

constructor
    · split_ifs at this <;> simp_all [stF.toFun_empty]
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hx_rel⟩ := h; exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hx_rel⟩

ctor.RoundByRoundOneShot.toRoundByRound]
    by_cases hn : n = 0
    · subst hn; have : tr = default := Subsingleton.elim _ _
      exact (stF.toFun_full stmtIn tr (this ▸ stF.toFun_empty stmtIn) ▸ h_pos).false.elim
    · left; contrapose! h_pos; exact stF.toFun_full stmtIn tr h_pos

obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h
    exact ⟨by cases n <;> simp_all [stF.toFun_empty], x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩

constructor
    · cases n <;> simp_all [stF.toFun_empty]
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hx'⟩ := h; exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hx'⟩

by_cases hn : n = 0
    · subst hn
      obtain ⟨x, hx, hrel⟩ := h
      have htr : tr = default := by ext i; exact Fin.elim0 i
      exact ⟨by rw [htr]; apply stF.toFun_empty, x, hx, witOut, hrel⟩
    · simp [hn, not_or] at this
      obtain ⟨x, hx, hrel⟩ := h
      exact ⟨this.1, x, hx, witOut, hrel⟩

constructor
    · cases n with
      | zero => exact Subsingleton.elim tr default ▸ stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      | succ n => exact (not_or.mp (by simp_all)).1
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hrel⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hrel⟩

by_cases hn : n = 0
    · subst hn
      have : tr = default := by ext i; exact i.elim0
      simp_all [stF.toFun_empty]
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩
    · simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩

by_cases hn : n = 0
    · subst hn
      simp_all
      have hpSpec : pSpec = !p[] := by ext i <;> exact Fin.elim0 i
      subst hpSpec
      have hTr : tr = default := by ext i; exact Fin.elim0 i
      subst hTr
      have := stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩
    · simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩

constructor
    · cases n
      · have : tr = default := by ext i; exact Fin.elim0 i
        rw [this]
        exact stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      · simp at this; intro h_stF; exact this (Or.inl h_stF)
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hRel⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hRel⟩

constructor
    · by_cases hn : n = 0
      · subst hn; simp_all [stF.toFun_empty, Subsingleton.elim tr default]
      · simp_all
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hrel⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hrel⟩

obtain ⟨x, hx, hx_rel⟩ := h
    exact ⟨by cases n <;> simp_all [stF.toFun_empty], x, hx, witOut, hx_rel⟩

constructor
    · cases n with
      | zero => exact stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      | succ n' => exact this.1
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hRel⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hRel⟩

constructor
    · by_cases hn : n = 0
      · subst hn; have : tr = default := by ext i; exact Fin.elim0 i
        subst this; exact stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      · simp_all; exact this.1
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h; exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩

obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h
    refine ⟨?_, x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩
    by_cases hn : n = 0
    · subst hn; have : tr = default := by ext i; exact Fin.elim0 i
      subst this; exact stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
    · exact this.1

by_cases hn : n = 0
    · subst hn
      simp_all [stF.toFun_empty, Subsingleton.elim tr default]
      obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩
    · simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩

constructor
    · cases n with
      | zero => rw [Subsingleton.elim tr default]; exact stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      | succ n => simp_all
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hx_rel⟩ := h; exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hx_rel⟩

refine ⟨?_, h.imp fun x hx => ⟨hx.1, witOut, hx.2⟩⟩
    cases n with
    | zero =>
      have : tr = default := Subsingleton.elim _ _
      rw [this]
      exact stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
    | succ n => simp_all; assumption

constructor
    · split_ifs at this with hn
      · subst hn; rw [Subsingleton.elim tr default]; exact stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      · exact this.1
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hx'⟩ := h; exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hx'⟩

constructor
    · split_ifs at this with hn
      · subst hn; rw [Subsingleton.elim tr default]; exact stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      · simp_all
    · obtain ⟨x, hx, hrel⟩ := h; exact ⟨x, hx, witOut, hrel⟩
